# Changelog

All notable changes to RAPID are documented here. This changelog is generated from ROADMAP.md set descriptions using `/rapid:documentation`.

Format follows [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/).

<!-- Generated by /rapid:documentation -- do not edit manually -->

## [v7.0.1] (in progress)

This patch release is currently under development. Subsections will be populated by `/rapid:documentation` when the patch ships.

## [v7.0.0] (shipped 2026-04-18)

Mission Control overhaul: SDK-backed autonomous agent runs, persistent chat sessions, browser-native skill invocation, kanban autopilot, and a host of backend observability and safety rails. This milestone grafts the Claude Agent SDK into the FastAPI web backend, turning Mission Control from a read-only dashboard into a full agent control plane.

### Added
- Request logging middleware, agent run lifecycle logging, autopilot logging, and uvicorn-reload-compatible log configuration in the web backend (`add-logging-to-backend`)
- Markdown rendering for activity feed messages with XSS sanitization via `react-markdown` (`activity-tab-markdown-rendering`)
- Autopilot agent-completed status tagging: card `agent_status` transitions automatically on run completion with test coverage (`autopilot-agent-completed-tag`)
- Kanban card creation modal and per-card autopilot-ignore toggle in the frontend (`kanban-card-modal-and-ignore-toggle`)
- Kanban per-card agent type selection: `agent_type` on cards, `default_agent_type` on columns, and UI routing for agent dispatch (`kanban-agent-selection`)
- Agent chat persistent sessions: backend endpoint and session manager, frontend Chat buttons, materialized run history with 15-minute idle timeout, and integration tests (`agent-chat-and-persistent-sessions`)
- Collapsible tool-calls drawer primitive (`ToolCallDrawer`) wired into `ChatThreadPage` with unit tests (`collapsible-tool-calls-drawer`)
- In-progress permission system and AskUserModal rewrite with kanban UI updates (`agents-wip`)

### Changed
- Ask-user option selection now highlights the chosen choice and submits inline (`ask-user-option-selection-highlight`)
- `/rapid:add-set` split dual-mode reference by question shape, hardened Step 2 against options-injection, with regression tests for dual-mode reference structure (`add-set-shows-a-dropdown-of-current-sets`)
- `/rapid:discuss-set --skip` rewritten as a self-interview protocol with updated Step 7 notes, key principles, and anti-patterns, plus regression tests (`discuss-set-skip-self-interview`)
- `/rapid:start-set` pending dropdown now lists available sets in canonical DAG-wave order with insertion-order fallback, and help text updated accordingly (`start-set-pending-dropdown-canonical-order`)
- `/rapid:install` gains `uv` pre-flight detection, auto-install support in `setup.sh`, and surfacing in the `rapid-tools` prereqs probe (`install-offer-uv-pip-guidance`)
- `@fishjojo1` made-with-love credit banner restored to the top of README (`readme-made-with-love-banner`)
- `/rapid:init` and `/rapid:new-version` freeform prompts routed through `ask_free_text` (`fix-freeform-routing`)

### Fixed
- SQLite foreign keys disabled during alembic migrations so `batch_alter_table` can rename tables referenced by other FKs (`bug-fix`)
- Port-holding PID surfaced in `check_port_available` error messages (`bug-fix`)
- Generated systemd unit copied and daemon restarted on upgrade in the install skill (`bug-fix`)
- Install-skill verification step uses interactive fish so shell config loads correctly (`bug-fix`)
- `setup.sh` uses `npx vite build` so `dist/` is created despite tsc errors (`bug-fix`)
- Autopilot `allowed-tools` frontmatter normalized to string form (`bug-fix`)
- `idle` status included in `AgentRunResponse` and `StatusEvent` status `Literal`s (`bug-fix`)
- `is_error=false` flip for AUQ bridge-success tool results (`bug-fix`)
- Agents not disconnected while a prompt is pending: idle timeout deferred with unit test coverage (`dont-disconnect-agents-on-pending-questions`)
- Set dropdown filters to the current milestone and Launch-button flash removed (`bug-fix`)
- Set-ref freeform text replaced with a native select dropdown, autocomplete populated from project milestones, and `setId` derived from the set-ref form field for precondition checks (`bug-fix`)
- Kanban cross-column drag-and-drop gains visual drop-zone feedback (`bug-fix`)
- `ask_user` question persistence across agent run ends and page refreshes (`bug-fix`)
- Conversation history included in chat agent run prompts (`bug-fix`)
- `ask_user` prompt answer `tool_use_id` made optional and included in `ChatThreadPage` (`bug-fix`)
- AUQ dict options normalized to strings in the web bridge (`bug-fix`)
- Missing `GET /api/agents/runs` list endpoint added (`bug-fix`)
- Chat `send_message` wired to the agent runtime with SSE event streaming (`bug-fix`)
- `dag_service` transforms wave `nodes` key to `sets` (`bug-fix`)
- `AgentsPage` distinguishes no-project, error, and empty states (`bug-fix`)

## [v6.3.0] (shipped 2026-04-16)

## [v6.2.0] DX Refinements (shipped 2026-04-08)

Focused on branding infrastructure, developer experience polish, and documentation hygiene -- making the branding server live-reloadable, adding opt-in branding to init, surfacing update staleness reminders, and completing the artifact CRUD API.

### Added
- SSE-based auto-reload infrastructure for branding server with `/_events` endpoint, `fs.watch` debouncing, and connection tracking (`branding-overhaul`)
- Structured artifact registry (`branding-artifacts.cjs`) with Zod-validated manifest and CRUD operations (`branding-overhaul`)
- Hub page redesign rendering typed artifact cards instead of flat file list (`branding-overhaul`)
- Artifact CRUD HTTP API: `POST|GET|DELETE /_artifacts` endpoints (`branding-overhaul`)
- `updateArtifact()` function and `PATCH /_artifacts` endpoint with `artifact-updated` SSE event (`branding-crud-completion`)
- Optional branding opt-in gate at init Step 4B.5 with condensed inline branding interview (`init-branding-integration`)
- Install timestamp tracking in `version.cjs` with `writeInstallTimestamp`, `readInstallTimestamp`, `isUpdateStale` (`update-reminder`)
- `display update-reminder` CLI subcommand for staleness banner (`update-reminder`)
- Deferred update-reminder banners in `/rapid:status` and `/rapid:install` skills (`update-reminder`)
- `NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER` env var for suppressing update reminders (`update-reminder`)

### Changed
- Branding skill flow rewritten for sequential artifact generation (theme -> logo -> wireframe -> guidelines) (`branding-overhaul`)
- Version strings swept from v6.1.0 to v6.2.0 across all active files (`docs-and-housekeeping`)
- Runtime dependency Zod pinned to exact version `3.25.76` (`docs-and-housekeeping`)
- `.planning/context/` files regenerated for v6.2.0 codebase state (`docs-and-housekeeping`)
- `.env.example` updated with `NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER` documentation (`docs-and-housekeeping`)

### Fixed
- XSS prevention enforced for all dynamic content in branding hub page (`branding-overhaul`)
- SSE connection leak prevention with max 10 cap and cleanup on server stop (`branding-overhaul`)

## [v6.1.0] UX & Onboarding (shipped 2026-04-06)

Focused on first-run experience, command discoverability, and documentation quality -- making RAPID approachable for new users while tightening guidance for experienced ones.

### Added
- Unified `renderFooter()` utility applying next-step footer guidance to all lifecycle skills with `/clear` policy (`clear-guidance-and-display`)
- Audit-to-set handoff mechanism: `audit-version` writes structured REMEDIATION artifacts, `add-set` auto-discovers pending remediations, `status` displays pending sets (`audit-handoff`)
- `/rapid:backlog` skill for capturing out-of-scope feature ideas during execution, with audit-version integration and agent prompt updates (`backlog-system`)

### Changed
- README rewrite with context rot problem statement, single install path, `/clear` mental model, annotated quickstart, and "First Project" walkthrough (`readme-and-onboarding`)
- Systematic UX audit covering breadcrumb consistency, error messages, command discoverability, and first-run polish; wired auto-regroup after `add-set` (`ux-audit`)
- Version bump to v6.1.0 across all user-facing files, stale prose fixes, command count update (28 -> 29), Node.js prerequisite correction (20+ -> 22+) (`docs-housekeeping`)

### Fixed
- Node.js prerequisite documentation corrected from 20+ to 22+ in CONTRIBUTING.md and docs/setup.md (`docs-housekeeping`)

## [v6.0.0] Scale & Quality (shipped 2026-04-01)

### Added
- DAGv3 schema with optional `group`, `priority`, `description` node fields and top-level `groups` summary (`dag-central-grouping`)
- DAG auto-migration from v1/v2 to v3 via `tryLoadDAG()` with version auto-detection (`dag-central-grouping`)
- Developer group partitioning algorithm: `partitionIntoGroups()`, `annotateDAGWithGroups()`, `generateGroupReport()` in new `group.cjs` module (`dag-central-grouping`)
- `syncDAGStatus()` centralizing DAG-to-STATE status synchronization (`dag-central-grouping`)
- `dag groups` and `dag regroup --team-size N` CLI subcommands (`dag-central-grouping`)
- `--spec <path>` flag for `/rapid:init` to seed research pipeline with pre-written spec content (`init-enhancements`)
- Meta-principles capture during init: `principles.cjs` module with `generatePrinciplesMd()`, `generateClaudeMdSection()`, `loadPrinciples()` (`init-enhancements`)
- `.planning/PRINCIPLES.md` artifact generated during init when principles are captured (`init-enhancements`)
- High-fidelity stub generation with `// RAPID-STUB` marker and `.rapid-stub` sidecar files (`scaffold-overhaul`)
- Group-aware stub orchestration via `generateGroupStubs()` consuming DAG group partitions (`scaffold-overhaul`)
- `createFoundationSet()` for optional foundation set #0 with `foundation:true` DAG annotation (`scaffold-overhaul`)
- `scaffold verify-stubs` CLI subcommand for stub replacement status reporting (`scaffold-overhaul`)
- Scaffold-report v2 with groups, stubs, and foundationSet fields (`scaffold-overhaul`)
- Merge pipeline T0 auto-resolution: `tryStubAutoResolve()` -- real implementation wins over stubs (`scaffold-overhaul`)
- `fileOwnership` field in CONTRACT_META_SCHEMA (`bug-fixes-foundation`)

### Changed
- `dag show` extended with group badges and cross-group edge markers (`dag-central-grouping`)
- Roadmapper role module outputs group assignment guidance for team-size > 1 (`dag-central-grouping`)
- Worktree-scoped CLAUDE.md files gain optional principles summary section (`init-enhancements`)
- All 6 research role modules accept and tag spec-sourced assertions with `[FROM SPEC]` (`init-enhancements`)
- `generateStub()` rewritten for high-fidelity return values with RAPID-STUB marker (`scaffold-overhaul`)
- Namespace Isolation in `core-identity.md` strengthened with imperative MUST/MUST NOT directives and explicit deny-list (`agent-namespace-enforcement`)
- All 27 agents regenerated with updated identity module (`agent-namespace-enforcement`)
- Node.js minimum bumped from 18 to 20+ in prereqs.cjs and package.json engines (`bug-fixes-foundation`)
- `execSync` replaced with `execFileSync` in worktree.cjs to prevent shell injection (`bug-fixes-foundation`)
- Version references bumped from 5.0.0 to 6.0.0 across all user-facing files (`docs-version-bump`)

### Fixed
- REQUIREMENTS.md overwrite by `scaffoldProject()` -- content guard prevents clobbering user-approved encoded criteria (`bug-fixes-foundation`)
- `--desc` / `--description` flag mismatch in init CLI parser (`bug-fixes-foundation`)
- Roadmapper Step 9 STATE.json overwrite -- `mergeStatePartial()` for atomic state merging (`bug-fixes-foundation`)
- `recalculateDAG()` now preserves existing node annotations (group, priority, description) (`bug-fixes-foundation`)
- 43 unprefixed agent/skill references swept across 10 role module files (`agent-namespace-enforcement`)

## [v5.0] OSS Presentation (shipped 2026-03-31)

### Added
- Branding assets: SVG banner, lifecycle flow diagram, agent dispatch diagram, social preview image (`branding-assets`)
- Community infrastructure: CONTRIBUTING.md, GitHub issue templates (bug report, feature request -- standard and AI variants), PR template (`community-infra`)

### Changed
- README overhaul and reference migration to pragnition/RAPID with version bump (`readme-migration`)
- README polish pass for conciseness, scannability, and enlarged SVGs (`readme-polish`)
- Documentation update for DOCS.md and technical_documentation.md (`docs-update`)

## [v4.5] Developer Experience II (shipped 2026-03-26)

### Added
- Human-only UAT workflow separating automated checks from manual verification steps (`uat-workflow`)
- `--uat` flag for `/rapid:bug-fix` enabling automatic UAT failure fixing from UAT-FAILURES.md (`bugfix-uat`)
- Branding preview server for live BRANDING.md rendering (`branding-server`)

### Changed
- Generous set planning with expanded task granularity and coverage (`generous-planning`)

## [v4.4.0] Polish & Documentation (shipped 2026-03-25)

### Added
- Documentation overhaul: README.md rewrite, DOCS.md hub-and-spoke reorganization, docs/ breadcrumbs (`documentation`)
- Colour theming system with Everforest palette and BRANDING.md-aware colour selection (`colouring`)
- State check and mark-stage commands for review pipeline state tracking (`review-state`)

## [v4.3.0] Reliability & UX (shipped 2026-03-25)

### Fixed
- Consolidated project-root resolution to single canonical resolver across all call sites (`path-and-dag`)
- DAG.json path lookups now use resolved project root instead of cwd (`path-and-dag`)
- `withStateTransaction()` now produces distinct error types: STATE_FILE_MISSING, STATE_PARSE_ERROR, STATE_VALIDATION_ERROR (`state-reliability`)
- Orphaned `.tmp` file cleanup on transaction start (`state-reliability`)

### Added
- `--gaps` flag for plan-set and execute-set enabling gap-closure on merged sets (`gap-closure`)
- `--spec <path>` argument for new-version to pre-populate goals from a file (`new-version-ux`)
- Auto-discovery of DEFERRED.md files in new-version researcher briefs (`new-version-ux`)

## [v4.2.1] Discuss & Audit (shipped 2026-03-24)

### Added
- `/rapid:audit-version` skill and `rapid-auditor` agent for milestone gap analysis (`audit-version`)
- Two-pass audit strategy for milestones with 5+ sets (`audit-version`)

### Changed
- Consolidated gray area presentation in discuss-set to single multiSelect prompt (`discuss-ux`)
- Replaced markdown table with structured list layout in discuss-set option display (`discuss-ux`)

### Fixed
- `RAPID_TOOLS` path resolution using `path.dirname()` instead of string concatenation (`path-resolution-fix`)

## [v4.1.0] Polish & Fixes (shipped 2026-03-23)

## [v4.0.0] Mission Control

### Added
- FastAPI application shell, SQLite database with WAL mode and Alembic migrations, health endpoints, security defaults (`service-infrastructure`)
- Project CRUD endpoints with pagination, FileWatcherService, .rapid-web/ sync layer (`project-registry`)
- React 19 + Vite 8 + TypeScript SPA, Everforest dark/light theme, vim-style keyboard navigation, command palette (`frontend-shell`)
- Four dashboard views: Project State, Worktree Tracking, Knowledge Graph (Cytoscape.js), Codebase Mapping (tree-sitter) (`read-only-views`)
- Kanban Board (dnd-kit drag-drop) and Markdown Note Editor (CodeMirror 6 with vim mode) (`interactive-features`)
- Non-blocking web-client.cjs helper, /install web service setup, /init auto-registration, doctor health checks (`cli-integration`)

## [v3.6.0] Workflow & UX Polish — shipped 2026-03-20

### Fixed
- DAG.json lifecycle fixes, path consolidation, ENOENT handling (`dag-and-state-fixes`)

### Changed
- Solo mode lifecycle completion, auto-transition complete→merged (`solo-mode`)
- AskUserQuestion gates between bug-hunt review cycles (`review-cycle-confirmation`)
- Structured AskUserQuestion init flow, granularity preference (`init-flow-redesign`)

### Added
- Optional /rapid:branding skill, BRANDING.md artifact (`branding-system`)

## [v3.5.0] Robustness & Fixes — shipped 2026-03-19

### Fixed
- Execute-to-complete state transition fix, merge untracked file handling (`state-execution`)
- CLI command reference sweep across all agents and skills, discuss-set option limit fix (`agent-prompts`)

### Changed
- DEFINITION.md generation, graceful loadSet(), solo mode config, worktree package management (`init-config`)
- UI/UX emphasis in templates, review file discovery auto-detection (`planning-refinement`)

### Added
- /rapid:bug-fix skill for targeted bug investigation and fixing (`state-execution`)

## [v3.4.0] Agent Intelligence — shipped 2026-03-18

### Added
- Append-only JSONL decision log, corrections log, cross-milestone preferences (`memory-system`)
- Persistent /quick task logging, add-set with state CLI backing (`quick-and-addset`)
- Node.js hook system for state verification after agent tasks (`hooks-system`)
- Quality profile system, enhanced prepareSetContext(), quality gates (`code-quality`)
- Per-set UI-CONTRACT.json schema with Ajv validation (`ui-contracts`)
- Agent-driven docs generation, changelog extraction, /rapid:documentation skill (`documentation`)

## [v3.3.0] Developer Experience — shipped 2026-03-17

### Added
- Solo mode (no worktree) execution for single-developer workflows (`solo-mode`)
- Version migration tooling (`version-migration`)
- Project scaffold command (`scaffold-command`)

### Changed
- Core infrastructure hardening (`foundation-hardening`)
- Data integrity improvements (`data-integrity`)
- CLI command restructuring (`cli-restructuring`)
- Review pipeline improvements (`review-pipeline`)
- Context window optimization (`context-optimization`)

### Fixed
- Structural code cleanup (`structural-cleanup`)
- Bug fixes (`bug-fixes`)

## [v3.2.0] General Fixes — shipped 2026-03-14

### Fixed
- Fix skill-layer status literals to match state machine past-tense (`state-consistency`)
- Remove references to non-existent rapid-tools.cjs commands (`command-audit`)
- Switch resolveSet() from filesystem to STATE.json-based resolution (`resolve-fix`)

### Changed
- AskUserQuestion UX rewrite, banner colors to dark purple (`ux-improvements`)

### Added
- --post-merge flag to review skill (`review-after-merge`)

## [v3.1.0] Polish & Cleanup — shipped 2026-03-13

### Changed
- Rename set statuses from present-tense to past-tense (`status-rename`)
- Remove deprecated CLI commands and stubs (`command-cleanup`)
- Version-aware install with path configuration (`install-version`)
- Parallel wave dispatch in execute-set (`parallel-waves`)

## [v3.0] Refresh — shipped 2026-03-13

### Changed
- Set-level state only, discussing status, crash recovery (`state-machine-simplification`)
- Per-agent tool docs, XML prompt schema, core module consolidation (`tool-docs-core-module-refactor`)
- CLI pruning, deprecation stubs, /status, /install (`cli-surface-utility-commands`)
- Hybrid build, SKIP_GENERATION, 5th researcher (`build-pipeline-generated-agents`)
- Hand-written planner, executor, merger, reviewer; orchestrator removed (`core-agent-rewrites`)
- Rewritten init, start-set, discuss-set, plan-set (`planning-discussion-skills`)
- execute-set, quick, add-set, new-version (`execution-auxiliary-skills`)
- Docs updated, dead code removed, contracts simplified (`documentation-contracts-cleanup`)

## [v2.2] Subagent Merger & Documentation — shipped 2026-03-12

### Added
- MERGE-STATE schema and helper functions (`merge-state-schema`)
- Per-set rapid-set-merger subagents (`merge-subagent-delegation`)
- Per-conflict agents for mid-confidence escalations (`adaptive-conflict-resolution`)

### Changed
- Complete README reflecting all capabilities (`readme-rewrite`)
- Power user technical reference (`technical-documentation`)

## [v2.1] Improvements & Fixes — shipped 2026-03-10

### Added
- Remove all GSD vestiges from source and runtime (`gsd-decontamination`)
- Numeric shorthand for set/wave references (`numeric-id-infrastructure`)
- Branding banners and color-coded agent display (`ux-branding-colors`)
- Register role modules as Claude Code agents with build pipeline (`skill-to-agent-overhaul`)
- Agent for coverage, implementability, consistency validation (`plan-verifier`)
- Auto-chain with dependency-aware sequencing (`wave-orchestration`)
- Scoper delegation and concern-based scoping (`review-efficiency`)

### Changed
- Streamlined ordering, wave context, next-step guidance (`workflow-clarity`)
- Batched questioning halving interactions (`discuss-optimization`)
- Review at set level with directory chunking (`set-based-review`)

## [v2.0] Mark II — shipped 2026-03-09

### Added
- Sets/Waves/Jobs replacing linear phase model (`sets-waves-jobs-hierarchy`)
- Zod schemas and validated transitions for hierarchy (`hierarchical-state-machine`)
- Greenfield/brownfield detection and roadmap creation (`init-overhaul`)
- Per-set worktree+branch creation with set planning (`set-init-command`)
- Wave Planner and Job Planner agents (`wave-job-planning`)
- Executor with atomic commits (`executor-agent`)
- UAT, unit tests, bug hunting pipeline (`review-module`)
- 5-level detection, 4-tier resolution, bisection recovery (`merger-pipeline`)

## [v1.1] Polish — shipped 2026-03-06

### Changed
- AskUserQuestion for all user interactions (`ask-user-question-gates`)
- Shell detection, auto-source config, RAPID_TOOLS verification (`install-skill`)
- Structured error recovery paths replacing bare STOP handling (`error-recovery`)
- Progress indicators during subagent operations (`progress-indicators`)
- UI/UX polish across all skills (`ux-improvements`)
- Final cleanup and edge case fixes (`polish-cleanup`)

## [v1.0] MVP — shipped 2026-03-03

### Added
- Plugin shell, .claude-plugin manifest, skill/agent/hook scaffolding (`plugin-infrastructure`)
- Agent definition format, role modules, prompt assembly (`agent-framework`)
- Zod schemas, state machine, file locking, crash recovery (`state-management`)
- Git worktree creation, registry, scoped CLAUDE.md generation (`worktree-isolation`)
- CONTRACT.json format, Ajv validation, contract test generation (`interface-contracts`)
- Execution context prep, prompt assembly, artifact verification (`execution-engine`)
- 5-level conflict detection, 4-tier resolution cascade (`merge-pipeline`)
- Adversarial review pipeline: hunter/devils-advocate/judge (`review-system`)
- README, DOCS.md, technical reference (`documentation`)
- Package for Claude Code plugin marketplace (`plugin-marketplace`)
- Setup.sh and RAPID_TOOLS path configuration (`setup-script`)
